productDisplayName: Nike Men Dunk High Grey Shoes
description: Style NoteDesigned for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk High has a high heel counter to provide ample structural support to the ankle, protecting it from sprains and injuries when playing sport. Coupled with an uber cool look, it has a superior traction feature that makes the Nike Dunk High a huge favourite both on the court and off it. If you enjoy wearing a sporty look, simply pair the Dunk High with jeans and casual tees.Product DetailsGrey mid-top shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, nike swoosh and stitched detailingPadded tongue and innerTough rubber midsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
